MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's Motion For Order Quashing Deposition Subpoenas For Production Of Records To San Francisco General Hospital, Kaiser Hospital & PMG, David Patruska, And Foto-Med Solutions is granted. No opposition has been filed. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $740, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
